entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The largest staple crop produced worldwide.

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring food availability and access globally.

entities.name: MAIZE WEEVIL
entities.description: A primary postharvest insect pest (Sitophilus zeamais) that causes grain losses.

entities.name: LARGE GRAIN BORER
entities.description: A primary postharvest insect pest (Prostephanus truncatus) that causes grain losses.

entities.name: FOOD-GRAIN LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in total production of food grains during storage.

entities.name: STORAGE
entities.description: The postharvest phase where grains are kept, susceptible to pest attack.

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where food-grain losses are high and management strategies are less accessible.

entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of reducing or eliminating pests.

entities.name: HERMETIC STORAGE STRUCTURES
entities.description: Airtight storage systems used for pest management.

entities.name: CHEMICAL INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill insect pests.

entities.name: LOW-INCOME REGIONS
entities.description: Areas where smallholders have limited access to pest management tools.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDERS
entities.description: Small-scale farmers typically found in low-income regions.

entities.name: MODERN BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Scientific efforts to develop crop varieties with desired traits.

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait of a crop variety that reduces losses from postharvest pests.

entities.name: MAIZE KERNEL-PEST INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The biological relationship and interactions between maize kernels and pests.

entities.name: KERNEL RESISTANCE
entities.description: The specific resistance mechanisms present in the maize kernel.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL PERSPECTIVES
entities.description: The use of biotechnology to improve natural kernel resistance.

entities.name: RESISTANCE MECHANISMS
entities.description: The biological bases and processes that enable a plant to resist pests.
